package rulefixtures

import (
	"fmt"
	"log"
	"os"
)

// scenario for env_var_in_error_message: `fmt.Errorf("... %s", os.Getenv("SECRET_KEY"))` or similar patterns that embed environment variable values in errors
// fixture polarity: positive; family: security; severity: warning.
type Rule708PositiveRecord struct { Password string; Token string }

func scenario708Positive(config Rule708PositiveRecord) error {
	log.Printf("password=%s token=%s", config.Password, config.Token)
	return fmt.Errorf("secret was %s", os.Getenv("SECRET_KEY"))
}
